overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game featuring a character in a green jacket exploring dark, atmospheric industrial interiors. The character navigates through storage rooms, workshops, concrete stairwells, and an abandoned reception area with a flashlight illuminating the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow storage room with metal shelving units

events.description: character pushes through metal shelving racks to clear a path

agents.ego_description: pushing through metal shelving units to create a path forward in the storage room

wooden ladder leaning against the shelving
large wooden cable reels stacked on shelves

segments.scene_description: The character navigates a cramped storage room, physically pushing through metal shelving units to clear a path. The space is dimly lit with industrial shelving lining the walls.

events.description: exits storage room into workshop area with large observation window
screen fades to black indicating transition to next area

agents.ego_description: walking through workshop area toward the exit

entered.detail: large rectangular window looking into adjacent workshop room
racks holding vehicle tires and wheels
wooden workbench with tools and equipment

segments.scene_description: The character enters a workshop area featuring a large observation window looking into another room. Vehicle tires and a workbench are visible before the screen transitions to black.

events.description: emerges from darkness into green-painted industrial corridor
turns right to approach large industrial machine and door

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow corridors past industrial equipment toward a door

wooden door with frosted glass panel and metal handle

posters and notices on green painted walls

segments.scene_description: The character explores a narrow industrial corridor with green painted walls, passing large machinery and approaching a wooden door with frosted glass. The environment features pipes, wall posters, and a fire extinguisher.

events.description: opens door and enters concrete stairwell

agents.ego_description: climbing up concrete stairs in a narrow stairwell

metal pipe handrail along the stair wall

segments.scene_description: The character opens a door and enters a narrow concrete stairwell, ascending the stairs illuminated by sparse wall-mounted lights. The rough concrete walls and metal handrail emphasize the industrial setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned reception lobby with curved counter

events.description: exits stairwell into hallway leading to open lobby
enters brighter lobby area with skylight illumination

agents.ego_description: walking through hallway into large reception area, observing the abandoned lobby

entered.detail: large curved reception counter with green paint and blue accents
framed movie posters including 'The Ring' on green walls
large rectangular skylight in ceiling allowing natural light
circular windows in the far wall
blue vending machine against the wall

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the stairwell into a hallway and enters a large abandoned reception lobby. The space features a distinctive green curved reception counter, movie posters on the walls, and a skylight providing natural illumination. Round windows and scattered furniture complete the eerie, deserted atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the claustrophobic confines of a storage area into a vast, light-filled abandoned lobby. It begins with the character pushing through metal shelving in a cramped storage room before moving into a workshop area characterized by a large observation window and scattered vehicle tires. The scene then shifts into a narrow industrial corridor with green walls and heavy machinery, leading the character through a frosted glass door and up a stark concrete stairwell illuminated by sparse wall lights. Finally, the camera emerges from the stairs into a wide reception lobby, where the oppressive darkness gives way to natural light from a skylight reflecting off a curved green counter and deserted furniture.
